_format_note: This is NOT a raw SigNoz dashboard payload -- it's a small internal panel spec that scripts/provision_dashboards.py translates into a real signoz_create_dashboard call (title/description/tags/layout/widgets). Kept separate from the SigNoz-native JSON shape (widget UUIDs, grid x/y/w/h, panelTypes strings, etc.) because that full schema wasn't confirmed live from this environment -- see provision_dashboards.py's module docstring. Every panel here reads one of the five metrics guardian/writeback.py's HealthWriteback class emits via OTLP (Section 4.4's table, adapted per writeback.py's design-decision note: panels read our own materialized metrics rather than re-deriving R1-R7's detection logic as raw trace-tree queries).
title: Telemetry Health Guardian
description: Auditor for telemetry hygiene -- per-service health score plus the R1/R2/R3/R6/R7 signals behind it. Not a replacement for SigNoz's own APM/trace views (Section 4.6).

promql_vs_builder_comparison.title: Health Score -- PromQL vs Builder Query
promql_vs_builder_comparison.note: Two side-by-side widgets over the same metric: one built as a builder_query, one as a promql query. OTel dotted metric names need the Prometheus 3.x UTF-8 quoted-selector form, e.g. avg by (service_name) ({"telemetry.health_score"}) -- see signoz://promql/instructions per the signoz-mcp-server README.
